name: The North
introduction: A melodic house cut built around a single, endlessly repeating phrase.
about:
Write a few sentences about the release here: where it came from, the mood you were chasing, how it fits the rest of the catalogue. HTML is allowed, so you can use emphasis, links and multiple paragraphs.

Add whatever detail suits the release — a note on the production or the artwork.
